articles.headline: Apple Sues OpenAI for Trade Secret Theft Ahead of Its Own ChatGPT Hardware Push
articles.summary: Apple filed a lawsuit alleging OpenAI stole trade secrets, intensifying competition in the AI sector as Apple accelerates plans to build its own hardware for ChatGPT. This legal clash could disrupt AI licensing deals, raise costs for enterprise AI integrations, and reshape hardware demand for AI chips.

articles.headline: Meta Announces $50 Billion, 5GW Supercluster in Louisiana, Marking Largest AI Data Center Investment
articles.summary: Meta confirmed its Hyperion data center supercluster in Louisiana will cost over $50 billion and deliver 5GW of power, representing the largest single AI infrastructure investment to date. This massive buildout could strain regional energy grids, increase cloud costs for businesses, and accelerate inflation in data-intensive sectors.

articles.headline: Meta to Invest $9.1 Billion in Canada's First AI Data Center, Boosting North American Cloud Capacity
articles.summary: Meta pledged $9.1 billion to build its first AI data center in Canada, expanding its North American cloud infrastructure amid rising demand for generative AI. The investment may lower latency for Canadian enterprises but could also tighten regional energy markets and influence cross-border data compliance strategies.
